caption: A man sits in a recording studio, wearing a white button-down shirt with suspenders and a small red bow tie. He has a distinctive, tall, grey, sculpted hairstyle and wears glasses and black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. The background features walls covered in framed photographs and clothing items, including shirts with "LEE" branding. A logo for the "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears on the screen, accompanied by social media icons and text. Across the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, speaking and shifting his head slightly. His mouth moves as he talks, and his gaze shifts from slightly downward to forward, indicating an active conversation. The camera remains stationary, capturing his upper body and the surrounding studio environment throughout the clip.
